00030 /*
00031  * __time
00032  */
00033 
00034 #include <sys/types.h>
00035 #include <sys/stat.h>
00036 #include <stdio.h>
00037 #include <stdlib.h>
00038 #include <string.h>
00039 #include <unistd.h>
00040 #include <errno.h>
00041 #include <err.h>
00042 
00043 #include "config.h"
00044 #include "test.h"
00045 
00046 static
00047 void
00048 time_badsecs(void *ptr, const char *desc)
00049 {
00050         int rv;
00051 
00052         rv = __time(ptr, NULL);
00053         report_test(rv, errno, EFAULT, desc);
00054 }
00055 
00056 static
00057 void
00058 time_badnsecs(void *ptr, const char *desc)
00059 {
00060         int rv;
00061 
00062         rv = __time(NULL, ptr);
00063         report_test(rv, errno, EFAULT, desc);
00064 }
00065 
00066 void
00067 test_time(void)
00068 {
00069         time_badsecs(INVAL_PTR, "__time with invalid seconds pointer");
00070         time_badsecs(KERN_PTR, "__time with kernel seconds pointer");
00071 
00072         time_badnsecs(INVAL_PTR, "__time with invalid nsecs pointer");
00073         time_badnsecs(KERN_PTR, "__time with kernel nsecs pointer");
00074 }
